Replaced full scenario/test-history production names across resume host/live source with concise package-owned names, added source-name guard over src/codexhx/runtime/tui/resume, documented upstream/generated-Rust layout policy, removed ambiguous provenance wording from active docs/source, and verified format, source-name guard, public precommit, generated Cargo portable/metal, live app-server boundary gate, and ninth-cycle replay generated-Rust gate.

Implemented nested generated Rust output via generic haxe.rust -D rust_nested_modules. haxe.rust commit a5eb79a6562bfc920f045464c2696bbf07f580dc passed CI run 28057088203; codex-hxrust pin updated; generated portable/metal Cargo gates pass; resume live app-server boundary generated Rust now emits nested codexhx/runtime/tui/resume/live/*.rs paths and passes.

Implemented HXCX-TUI-250 ninth-cycle replay completion handoff under codexhx.runtime.tui.resume.live.recovery.ninth with short production class names. Added interpreter plus haxe.rust-generated Rust harness; verified completed_recovered_selection handoff is sourced from ninth-cycle snapshot replay, preserves recovered selection/footer/snapshot/readiness/render-state/handoff evidence, and suppresses live/model/filesystem/state effects.

Completed diagnostic summary cleanup: report DTO summaries now use DiagnosticSummary helpers, late-cycle deep source handoff summaries use bounded nested diagnostics, direct helper coverage was added to DiagnosticsHarness, and affected interpreter/generated-Rust/public-precommit gates pass. Follow-on package namespace cleanup remains tracked separately by codex-hxrust-er2c.

Moved the resume/TUI deterministic validation gate tree from codexhx.runtime.tui.resume.live to codexhx.validation.tui.resume.live, updated test imports and docs/AGENTS, preserved runtime host abstractions under codexhx.runtime, fixed the stale render-snapshot expected pagination line discovered by the interpreter sweep, and verified representative generated-Rust gates plus public precommit.
Implemented in haxe.rust 6d544cf506e668bc56b66c7d2cbe0abf5094667e with direct rust.SystemTime externs, no-hxrt coverage, rust_path_time snapshot coverage, and codex-hxrust pin validation.

Fixed generically in haxe.rust commit 5fdc545bfc44b9e50a2c5dcf2249ac5f5f95f5db. Added string_ternary_fallback_reuse snapshot fixture, remaining-read branch fallback cloning, loop read accounting, and closure-captured reusable-local guard; refreshed snapshots. Validated haxe.rust targeted snapshots, full snapshot refresh, check-metal-policy, local-path/deprecated-define guards, and codex-hxrust generated portable/metal Cargo gates via pin update plus npm run public:precommit.

Fixed generically in haxe.rust commit 104e05430ce48d8ed0444ebf05235deaba1d1111. Added class_field_record_default_reuse snapshot fixture and constructor lowering now uses null/reference-safe placeholders for emitted class-reference fields assigned by the constructor instead of eagerly invoking nested field-record defaults. Validated haxe.rust targeted snapshots, full snapshot sweep, check-metal-policy, local-path/deprecated-define guards, codex-hxrust generated portable/metal Cargo gates via pin update, and npm run public:precommit.
